features: A FRAGRANT EXPERIENCE: Enjoy a fragrant, nourishing experience each time you wash your hands with Palmolive Naturals Milk & Honey Liquid Hand Soap.

WITH VITAMIN E: Our liquid soap, with a honey scent and almond milk, has been inspired by nature to delight your senses, and is enriched with vitamin E to leave your hands feeling soft and nourished each time you wash them.

NATURAL ORIGIN INGREDIENTS: Not only does our liquid soap contain vitamin E and plant-based milk, but it’s also made with ingredients of 96% natural origin*. (*Water and naturally sourced ingredients with limited processing.)
98% BIODEGRADABLE FORMULA: Being thoughtful, our hand soap has a 98% biodegradable formula and comes in a bottle that you can recycle after removing the pump.
DERMATOLOGICALLY TESTED: Our vitamin E soap has also been dermatologically tested.
description: Product Description The Palmolive Naturals Milk & Honey 12x300ml Liquid Hand Wash Soap, enriched with Vitamin E, leaves your hands feeling soft & nourished. The beautifully fragrant hand soap, inspired by nature, delights your senses. Ingredients Aqua, Sodium Laureth Sulfate, Sodium Chloride, Cocamidopropyl Betaine, Glycerin, Cocamide MEA, Parfum, Sodium Salicylate, Glycol Distearate, Sodium Benzoate, Citric Acid, Polyquaternium-7, Styrene/Acrylates Copolymer, Tetrasodium EDTA, Laureth-4, Lactose, Whey Protein, Mel, Benzyl Benzoate, Benzyl Salicylate, Hexyl Cinnamal, CI 16255, CI 19140 Manufacturer Contact Information Guildford Business Park Guildford GU2 8XG See more
